description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a dark gray exterior, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern. The facade is clean and minimalist, with a mix of horizontal siding and a section of light-colored brickwork near the entryway. The house includes a recessed main entrance, partially sheltered by an overhang, and a driveway or garage area on one side. A prominent feature is the large, blooming tree with pink foliage situated close to the building, adding a touch of natural contrast. The windows are generously sized, allowing for ample natural light, and the overall structure is boxy with sharp, clean lines. The roof appears to have utility access points and a small terrace or open area.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, dark gray siding, and a light brick entry section, complemented by a blooming pink tree nearby.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, dark gray siding, and a light brick section near the entry; the pink tree is visible to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large grid windows, and the pink tree prominently in front of the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more windows and the pink tree to the left, showing a small terrace or open area on the roof.
description_view_3: Rear/angled view displaying additional large windows, the boxy structure, and the absence of the tree in the immediate foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, light brick surround, and no visible steps or porch
